task:
Invert the Oz governed-read scope from an allowlist to a denylist so Oz may read any git-tracked repo file, while secrets/runtime/host-escape paths stay rejected. Write stays gated (do NOT add any write/commit path). Make these four coordinated changes:

1. SCOPE CONTRACT — packages/core/src/write-scope/governed-read.ts: Replace the GOVERNED_READ_SCOPE allowlist constant with a GOVERNED_READ_DENY denylist constant covering exactly these hazard classes: (a) local/** (auth token, sqlite DB, audit logs, PIDs, runtime state); (b) **/.env* ; (c) **/secrets/** ; (d) **/*credentials* (covers .quinn-credentials.json); (e) .git/** ; (f) node_modules/**. Keep using the existing tested matchesAny glob helper — write NO new glob code. Export GOVERNED_READ_DENY from @cocoder/core via packages/core/src/index.ts (remove the old GOVERNED_READ_SCOPE export).

2. HANDLER — packages/daemon/src/launcher.ts readGoverned(): KEEP every existing guard (repo-root resolution, path normalize, .. traversal rejection, absolute-path rejection, NUL rejection). Then DEFAULT-ALLOW the read, rejecting ONLY when the normalized repo-relative path matchesAny(path, GOVERNED_READ_DENY). Still read-only — no write path. The repo-root boundary must remain hard (paths resolving outside repo root rejected before the denylist check).

3. TESTS — rewrite governed-read-scope.test.ts and read-governed.test.ts to prove the NEW contract in BOTH directions: (a) ALLOW: packages/core/src/index.ts and ARCHITECTURE.md now return real live file content; (b) REJECT without reading: local/secrets/oz-token, a **/.env path, traversal (../ outside root), and an absolute path — and assert the secret/target file content NEVER appears in the result (keep the no-content-leak assertions). Tests must fail if the denylist is weakened to a tautology or a guard is dropped.

4. TOOL INSTRUCTIONS — packages/*/oz-host.ts: update the read-governed tool description so Oz knows it may read ANY tracked repo file (not just governed zones), and that secrets/runtime-state/host-escape paths are refused.

ACCEPTANCE: pnpm typecheck passes for core and daemon; the rewritten governed-read-scope.test.ts and read-governed.test.ts pass; grep confirms GOVERNED_READ_SCOPE no longer exists anywhere. MUST NOT break: any other Oz tool surface, the repo-root/traversal/absolute guards, or read-only posture (no write/commit capability added). Report the exact files changed, the test command + output, and the typecheck output.
